interfaces.name: getHomepageSummary
interfaces.description: Fetch data for the homepage, including featured products and promotions.

interfaces.name: getProductFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for a product category listing page (e.g., water, dispensers).

interfaces.name: listProducts
interfaces.description: List products for a given category with filters, sorting, and pagination for product listing pages.

interfaces.name: searchProducts
interfaces.description: Search products by keyword with optional filters, sorting, and pagination. Used by header search and search results page.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Free-text search query; e.g., 'still water 1l case'.

interfaces.name: getProductDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a single product for the product detail page, including purchase mode options.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Identifier of the product to display.

interfaces.name: addItemToCart
interfaces.description: Add a configured product (one-time, subscription, or rental) to the cart. Creates a cart if one does not exist.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Product to add to the cart.

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Retrieve the current cart contents and totals for the cart page or cart icon dropdown.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a specific cart item and return the updated cart summary.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: Identifier of the cart item to update.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove a specific cart item and return the updated cart summary.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: Identifier of the cart item to remove.

interfaces.name: applyPromoCodeToCart
interfaces.description: Apply a promo code to the current cart and return updated totals.

parameters.name: promoCode
parameters.description: Promo code string entered or pasted by the user.

error_code.description: Machine-readable error code if success is false; e.g., 'invalid_code', 'not_applicable'.

interfaces.name: getCheckoutData
interfaces.description: Get all data needed to render the checkout page: cart summary, saved addresses, and delivery options.

earliest_available_date.description: Earliest delivery date in ISO 8601 format.

interfaces.name: placeOrder
interfaces.description: Submit the order at checkout, including delivery address, date, time window, and method. Converts the current cart into an order and schedules delivery.

interfaces.name: listActivePromos
interfaces.description: List promotions for the Deals & Promo Codes page, optionally filtered by applicable order type.

parameters.name: applicableOrderType
parameters.description: Filter promotions by applicable order type; e.g., 'one_time_orders', 'subscriptions', 'all_orders'.

interfaces.name: getPromoDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific promotion for the promo detail panel.

parameters.name: promoId
parameters.description: Identifier of the promotion to display.

interfaces.name: getHelpCenterOverview
interfaces.description: Get data for the Help Center landing page, including featured articles and categories.

interfaces.name: searchHelpArticles
interfaces.description: Search Help Center articles by keyword.

interfaces.name: getHelpArticleDetails
interfaces.description: Fetch the full content of a Help Center article for the help article page.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: Slug of the help article; e.g., 'minimum-order-amount'.

interfaces.name: getMyAccountOverview
interfaces.description: Get a snapshot overview for the My Account page, including default address, active subscriptions, and upcoming deliveries.

interfaces.name: getMySubscriptions
interfaces.description: List subscriptions for the My Subscriptions page, optionally filtered by status.

interfaces.name: getSubscriptionDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific subscription to populate the Subscription Detail page.

parameters.name: subscriptionId
parameters.description: Identifier of the subscription to manage.

interfaces.name: updateSubscriptionSettings
interfaces.description: Update frequency, quantity, delivery day, and address for an existing subscription.

parameters.name: subscriptionId
parameters.description: Identifier of the subscription to update.

parameters.name: addressId
parameters.description: Address to use for this subscription.

interfaces.name: getAddresses
interfaces.description: List all saved addresses for the Addresses page and other address selectors.

interfaces.name: createAddress
interfaces.description: Create a new saved address.

interfaces.name: updateAddress
interfaces.description: Update an existing saved address.

parameters.name: addressId
parameters.description: Identifier of the address to update.

interfaces.name: deleteAddress
interfaces.description: Delete a saved address, if it is not required by active subscriptions or upcoming deliveries.

parameters.name: addressId
parameters.description: Identifier of the address to delete.

interfaces.name: getUpcomingDeliveries
interfaces.description: List upcoming deliveries for the Upcoming Deliveries page.

interfaces.name: getDeliveryRescheduleOptions
interfaces.description: Get options for rescheduling a specific delivery, including address list and allowable dates/time windows.

parameters.name: deliveryId
parameters.description: Identifier of the delivery to reschedule.

interfaces.name: rescheduleDelivery
interfaces.description: Reschedule an upcoming delivery to a new address, date, and time window.

parameters.name: deliveryId
parameters.description: Identifier of the delivery to reschedule.

parameters.name: newAddressId
parameters.description: Address to use for the rescheduled delivery.

parameters.name: newDate
parameters.description: New delivery date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

interfaces.name: getOrderDetails
interfaces.description: Get order details and associated delivery information for the Order Confirmation page or order detail views.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: Identifier of the order to display.

interfaces.name: getContactPageInfo
interfaces.description: Get static and semi-static information for the Contact page, such as contact details and service hours.

interfaces.name: submitContactRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a contact or support request from the Contact page form.

interfaces.name: getInformationalPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for informational pages such as About, Terms & Conditions, and Privacy Policy.

interfaces.name: getSiteSettings
interfaces.description: Get global site settings such as minimum order amount and default delivery options.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve the current cart or create a new one if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recompute cart subtotal, discounts, and total after cart changes.

helperFunctions.name: _validatePromoCodeForCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to validate a promo code against the current cart contents and settings.

helperFunctions.name: _getAvailableDeliveryDates
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute available delivery dates and time windows based on site settings and existing schedules.
